title: DeepSeek V4 goes GA with 1M context as legacy APIs retire
summary: DeepSeek's flagship V4 line exits preview: legacy chat and reasoner endpoints shut down today as new peak and off-peak API pricing takes effect.
body:
DeepSeek moved its V4 model family to general availability on July 24, completing a transition announced at the end of June and hard-coded into its API: the legacy `deepseek-chat` and `deepseek-reasoner` endpoints stop responding today, and all traffic migrates to `deepseek-v4-pro` and `deepseek-v4-flash`.

## From preview to production
The V4 line first appeared as an open-sourced preview on April 24 — V4-Pro at 1.6 trillion total parameters with 49 billion active, V4-Flash at 284 billion total with 13 billion active, both carrying a 1-million-token context window. According to TechNode, the general-availability build standardizes that million-token window across the lineup and targets stronger agentic task execution, mathematical reasoning, and code generation. Chinese media reported that a small-scale gray release began around July 21 after roughly two months of engineering optimization, with participating developers claiming overall quality approaching top closed-source models — claims that remain unverified pending independent benchmarks.

## New pricing, new silicon
The GA release introduces DeepSeek's first peak/off-peak API pricing: calls during 9:00–12:00 and 14:00–18:00 Beijing time cost twice the off-peak rate, an unusual demand-shaping mechanism for an LLM API. Chinese outlets also report the official build has been adapted away from CUDA dependence and is compatible with multiple domestic AI chips from day one, consistent with earlier disclosures about V4 post-training runs on Huawei Ascend hardware. The API remains compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic SDKs, and DeepSeek documents integrations with coding agents including Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and OpenCode.

## Why it matters
DeepSeek remains the reference point for open-weight frontier models, and this release is less about new capability than about industrialization: a hard same-day migration, time-of-day pricing that treats inference like an electric grid, and domestic-chip portability all signal a lab now optimizing for sustained commercial scale rather than research splashes. For the crowded Chinese model market — where Kimi K3, Qwen3.8, and MiniMax M3 launched within days of each other — V4's GA resets the baseline that every rival's pricing and agent performance will be measured against.
title_zh: DeepSeek V4 正式版上线:旧接口今日停服,峰谷计费生效
summary_zh: DeepSeek V4 系列今日转正:deepseek-chat 与 reasoner 旧接口停止服务强制迁移,国内大模型首个 API 峰谷计费同步落地。
body_zh:
DeepSeek 于 7 月 24 日将 V4 系列推至正式版,完成了 6 月底就预告、并写死在 API 文档里的切换:旧版 `deepseek-chat` 与 `deepseek-reasoner` 接口今日起停止响应,全部流量迁往 `deepseek-v4-pro` 与 `deepseek-v4-flash`。

## 从预览到量产
V4 系列 4 月 24 日以开源预览版首发——V4-Pro 总参数 1.6 万亿、激活 490 亿,V4-Flash 总参数 2840 亿、激活 130 亿,全系标配 100 万 token 上下文。据 TechNode 报道,正式版将百万上下文固化为全系标准,重点强化智能体任务执行、数学推理与代码生成。国内媒体消息称,正式版经过约两个月工程调优,7 月 21 日前后开启小范围灰度,参与灰测的开发者称其综合表现逼近顶级闭源模型——该说法尚待独立基准测试验证。

## 新计费与新算力
正式版同步启用 DeepSeek 首个 API 峰谷计费:北京时间 9:00–12:00 与 14:00–18:00 高峰时段价格为平峰两倍,这种用价格调节负载的做法在大模型 API 中尚属罕见。另据国内报道,正式版已完成去 CUDA 化适配,上线首日即兼容多款国产 AI 芯片,与此前 V4 在华为昇腾集群上完成后训练的披露一脉相承。API 继续兼容 OpenAI 与 Anthropic SDK,官方文档还列出了 Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、OpenCode 等编程智能体的接入方式。

## 为什么重要
DeepSeek 仍是开源前沿模型的标尺,而这次发布的看点不在新能力,而在'工业化':当天硬切换、把推理当电网一样分时定价、国产芯片可迁移——处处透出一家从'研究放卫星'转向'规模化商用'的实验室。对于 Kimi K3、Qwen3.8、MiniMax M3 几天内接连开火的中国模型市场,V4 转正重新划定了所有对手定价与智能体性能都要对照的基准线。

sources.title: DeepSeek to launch V4 in mid-July with new peak-time API pricing — TechNode
DeepSeek API Docs — model deprecation and V4 lineup

featured_reason: The most influential open-weight model line reaches GA with a forced same-day migration, resetting capability and price baselines for the whole open ecosystem.
featured_reason_zh: 最具影响力的开源模型线转正并当日强制迁移,重置整个开源生态的能力与价格基准。
